response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web engineer with strong testing discipline and broad polyglot exposure, but the resume shows no embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security work, no recent C/UNIX systems development, and no Linux kernel modification experience. Most critically, the role requires native-level Japanese, which is not listed among the candidate's languages (English, Romanian, basic German). These are hard requirements that disqualify the application.
strengths: Long track record of software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD practices
Brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Broad polyglot background across web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded-adjacent work
concerns: No native-level Japanese — hard requirement is unmet
No demonstrated Linux kernel investigation or source-code modification experience
No experience with network security (MACsec, 802.1X), L2/L3 switching, or chip-vendor SDKs

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / LAN-switch security background
